cluster.name: Carbon Monoxide Concentration Measurement
cluster.description: Attributes for reporting carbon monoxide concentration measurements

feature.name: NumericMeasurement
feature.summary: Cluster supports numeric measurement of substance

feature.name: LevelIndication
feature.summary: Cluster supports basic level indication for substance using the ConcentrationLevel enum

feature.name: MediumLevel
feature.summary: Cluster supports the Medium Concentration Level

feature.name: CriticalLevel
feature.summary: Cluster supports the Critical Concentration Level

feature.name: PeakMeasurement
feature.summary: Cluster supports peak numeric measurement of substance

feature.name: AverageMeasurement
feature.summary: Cluster supports average numeric measurement of substance

feature.name: CriticalLevel

feature.name: PeakMeasurement
feature.summary: Cluster supports peak numeric measurement of substance

feature.name: AverageMeasurement
feature.summary: Cluster supports average numeric measurement of substance
